scripts.baseline:smoke: vitest run packages/web-backend/src/app.test.ts --testNamePattern="health endpoint|auth flow|chat history API|memory API|settings API|providers API"
scripts.verify:critical-flows: npm run baseline:smoke && vitest run packages/web-backend/src/api/modules/tasks/route.test.ts packages/web-backend/src/cronjobs.test.ts
scripts.baseline:parity: npm run lint:boundaries && npm run baseline:unit && npm run baseline:api && npm run verify:critical-flows
